name: Scorpio Gold Corporation
description: Scorpio Gold Corporation is a Vancouver-based junior mining company focused on the exploration and development of gold properties in Nevada, USA. Its flagship Manhattan project encompasses the Goldwedge Mine, the Kinross Manhattan properties, and the Keystone and Jumbo deposits covering approximately 6,071 acres in the Manhattan Mining District of south-central Nevada. The company also holds an interest in the Mineral Ridge gold project in Esmeralda County, Nevada.
